title: Teatime
description: A vanilla+ tea mod with customizable brews!
body:
![Cover](https://i.imgur.com/rCVroZ2.png)
Teatime is a vanilla+ Fabric mod that focuses on adding a new tea-brewing system to the game with 45+ ingredients! Simply craft a kettle, fill it with water, and use a variety of ingredients from flowers, to food items, to mob drops, and create teas with multiple effects! There are no defined recipes, every tea is customizable to create a blend of effects for any of your intended needs!
🍵 Join our Discord! 🍵
As long as credited, Teatime may be used in modpacks, YouTube videos, etc.
